V0712_01_00_00_0.text: I told you to call me Tiger!!!

V0712_01_00_01_0.text: If it's a Rush Duel you want, it's a Rush Duel you'll get!

V0712_01_00_02_0.text: Like martial arts, Rush Duels are another form of combat.

V0712_01_00_03_0.text: My recital will be two notes higher than the competition!

V0712_01_00_04_0.text: I'll measure your skills in musical combat!

V0712_01_00_05_0.text: The rigors of battle will test the strength of your spirit!

V0712_01_00_06_0.text: You've always been my toughest rival, Asalina!

V0712_01_00_07_0.text: I've strengthened my Tiger's Breath so I can get my revenge!

V0712_01_00_08_0.text: My brother's known for making mistakes - such as Dueling me!

V0712_01_00_09_0.text: I know you love to Duel, but you must also love to lose!

V0712_01_00_10_0.text: Ready to go down, you blue-haired blundering boy!

V0712_01_00_11_0.text:
You mastered Dueling?
You couldn’t even master tic-tac-toe!

V0712_01_00_12_0.text:
You're not my brother.
You're my super baby baby brother!

V0712_01_00_13_0.text:
You're challenging me?
Stop making bad decisions!

V0712_01_00_14_0.text:
This is a Duel!
Not a costume contest!

V0712_48_00_00_0.text: Let's see what you can do!

V0712_03_00_00_0.text: What awaits you is only chaos and turmoil!

V0712_03_00_01_0.text: Not how you imagined this would go, huh?

V0712_03_00_03_0.text: Blowing you away is simple to do!

V0712_03_00_04_0.text: I'm not breathing hard at all!

V0712_03_00_05_0.text:
You're playing well.
But not well enough!

V0712_05_00_00_0.text:
Sigh...
You've made the mistake of making me angry!

V0712_07_09_01_0.text: Did you forget about this card?

V0712_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0712_16_00_00_0.text: I'm playing the final notes on this Duel!

V0712_16_00_01_0.text: The moment you chose to Duel me, you already lost.

V0712_21_00_00_0.text: I should've won by now, but I'm not worried.

V0712_21_00_01_0.text: Any last words before this Duel is over?

V0712_21_00_04_0.text: If you're done flattering yourself, make a move!

V0712_21_00_05_0.text: Don't make the mistake of thinking you've already won!

V0712_28_00_00_0.text: I've achieved complete control over my inner powers.

V0712_28_00_00_1.text:
I have mastered my ultimate strength!
Tiger’s Breath!

V0712_28_00_01_0.text: Musicians use controlled breathing to create great melodies.

V0712_28_00_01_1.text: Duelists can do the same to produce amazing victories!

V0712_28_00_02_0.text: Learn to think, act and breathe like the tiger!

V0712_28_00_03_0.text: I heard the most important thing in a Duel is to have fun.

V0712_28_00_04_0.text: Air feeds the fire that burns inside every one of us.

V0712_28_00_05_0.text: You may love to Duel, but that doesn’t guarantee you’ll win.

V0712_28_00_06_0.text:
Lucidien said you'd be tough.
But he's always wrong.

V0712_28_00_07_0.text: Where do you think your road will lead to?

V0712_28_00_08_0.text: That's what you get for disgracing our family!

V0712_28_00_09_0.text: The anger I felt towards you has blown away like the wind.

V0712_28_00_09_1.text: But my Tiger’s Breath still blows away your Heavy Machinery!

V0712_28_00_10_0.text: You may have a new mask, but your moves are still the same.

V0712_29_00_00_0.text: I may have many skills, but I still have a lot to learn.

V0712_29_00_01_0.text: Back to the dojo for more training.

V0712_29_00_02_0.text:
I wasn't breathing right...
My nose is stuffed...

V0712_29_00_03_0.text: I'll focus on my breathing and win our rematch!

V0712_29_00_04_0.text: You're a fighter - just like me.

V0712_29_00_05_0.text:
Just have fun Dueling...
You make losing not feel so bad.

V0712_29_00_06_0.text: Sevens Road Magician gains strength from his fallen allies.

V0712_29_00_06_1.text:
You have the heart of a warrior.
Like I do.

V0712_29_00_07_1.text: That means you're tough enough for a rematch too!

V0712_29_00_08_0.text:
Heh...
No one should every underestimate you, Romin.

V0712_29_00_09_0.text: We may be best friends, but we're also best rivals.

V0712_29_00_10_0.text:
Grr...
Is there a word more humiliating than humiliating?

V0712_33_00_00_0.text:
Feel the Tiger's Breath!
Live the Tiger's Breath!

V0712_33_00_01_0.text: This Duel will end in my victory!

V0712_30_00_00_0.text: I told you to call me Tiger!!!

V0712_30_00_01_0.text: Listen closely because I'm only telling you once!

V0712_30_00_02_0.text: When did I ever say that?

V0712_34_00_00_0.text: You should feel ashamed doing that.

V0712_34_00_01_0.text: Tiger's Breath is the key to unlock my inner powers!

V0712_34_00_02_0.text: Wind instruments teach you how to control your breathing!

V0712_34_00_03_0.text: Is your mind ready to accept defeat?

V0712_34_00_04_0.text:
Fuuu... Haaa...
Breathing helps me calm down.

V0712_34_00_05_0.text: Face the reality of your situation!

V0712_34_00_06_0.text: You think you've won? Don't be silly!

V0712_34_00_08_0.text: No one wants to hear you complain!

V0712_34_00_09_0.text: Exhale! Inhale! Now exhale and inhale at the same time!

V0712_34_00_11_0.text: You breathe like a tiger too.

V0712_32_00_01_0.text:
I'll only say this once because once is enough!
Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links!

V0712_35_00_00_0.text: Representing Goha #7 Elementary's Music Club - I'm Tiger!

V0712_35_00_01_0.text: I told you to call me Tiger!

V0712_36_00_01_0.text: If we're on the same page, you know what to do!

V0712_36_00_06_0.text: Even a silly spiked-hair simpleton can win this Duel.

V0712_36_00_08_0.text: The last thing I want to hear is you making excuses.

V0712_08_00_00_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Music Princess's Whirling Wind!

V0712_08_00_01_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Music Princess's Breath!

V0712_08_00_02_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Music Princess's Battle Ballet!

V0712_08_00_02_1.text: Due to its effect, I can Fusion Summon!

V0712_08_00_03_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Music Princess's Prelude!

V0712_08_00_04_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Straight Pierce!

V0712_08_00_05_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
One-Side Reverse!

V0712_08_00_06_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Fusion!

V0712_08_00_07_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Music Princess's Requiem!

V0712_08_00_08_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Music Princess Art - Triplet!

V0712_08_00_09_0.text: My Trap Card, Music Princess's Recital!

V0712_08_00_10_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Tiger Glare!

V0712_08_00_11_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Giant Tiger Strike!

V0712_08_00_12_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Trumpet Charge!

V0712_08_00_13_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Destruction of the Universe!

V0712_08_00_14_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
The Warrior Returning Alive!

V0712_08_00_15_0.text: I equip Beast Sword - Tiger Sabre on my monster!

V0712_08_00_16_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Ghost Tiger Strike!

V0712_08_00_17_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Polymerization!

V0712_08_00_17_1.text: Its effect allows me to Fusion Summon!

V0712_08_00_18_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Pierce!!

V0712_08_00_19_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Powerful Pierce!!!

V0712_09_00_00_0.text: I activate Ensembullfighter the Music Fiend's effect!

V0712_09_00_01_0.text: I activate Digisoon the Music Fiend's effect!

V0712_09_00_02_0.text: i activate Trumpetiger the Music Fiend's effect!

V0712_09_00_03_0.text: I activate Sansetsukontra the Music Fiend's effect!

V0712_09_00_04_0.text: I activate Full Orchestra the Music Fiend's effect!

V0712_09_00_04_1.text:
Your hopes are now gone!
Chords of Chaos!

V0712_09_00_05_0.text: I activate Divinebreath the Orchestral Music Fiend's effect!

V0712_09_00_06_0.text: I activate Axtion Melody the Music Princess's effect!

V0712_09_00_07_0.text: Tune Flutomahawk the Music Princess activates her effect!

V0712_09_00_08_0.text: I activate Tubardiche the Music Princess's effect!

V0712_09_00_09_0.text: Trumpetonfa the Music Princess activates her effect!

V0712_09_00_10_0.text: Nuncharinet the Music Princess activates her effect!

V0712_09_00_11_0.text: I activate Trombow the Music Princess of Melodic Crown's effect!

V0712_09_00_12_0.text: I activate Horn Knives the Music Princess's effect!

V0712_09_00_13_0.text: I activate Savage Claw Tiger's effect!

V0712_37_00_00_0.text: The oxygen in the atmosphere explodes into conflict!

V0712_13_00_00_0.text: I only need to say this once because once is enough!

V0712_13_00_00_1.text: Make some noise, Ensembullfighter the Music Fiend!

V0712_37_00_01_0.text:
Two fingers play notes of doom!
The pinky - a tragic tune!

V0712_37_00_01_1.text: Fill the air with a cacophony of calamity!

V0712_13_00_01_0.text:
Come on out!
Digisoon the Music Fiend!

V0712_37_00_02_0.text: Brass forged in fury, a mighty animal rises from the flames!

V0712_13_00_02_0.text:
Blare the sound of glory!
Trumpetiger the Music Fiend!

V0712_37_00_03_0.text: My instruments of melody unite into an instrument of mayhem!

V0712_37_00_03_1.text: Let your spirit burn into a crescendo!

V0712_13_00_04_0.text:
Sound forth!
Full Orchestra the Music Fiend!

V0712_37_00_04_0.text: A single chord is the opening note to strike up a symphony!

V0712_37_00_04_1.text: Let your sounds roar throughout the galaxy with power!

V0712_13_00_15_0.text: Trombow the Music Princess of Melodic Crown!

V0712_19_00_00_0.text:
Take this!
Ensembullfighter the Music Fiend! Attack!

V0712_19_00_01_0.text: My Tiger’s Breath blows away anything!

V0712_19_00_01_1.text:
Digisoon the Music Fiend! Attack!
Polyphonic Power Blast!

V0712_19_00_04_0.text: Time to attack, Full Orchestra the Music Fiend!

V0712_19_00_05_0.text:
Divinebreath the Orchestral Music Fiend!
Blow them away!

V0712_19_00_06_0.text:
Axtion Melody the Music Princess!
Attack!

V0712_19_00_07_0.text: Attack, Tune Flutomahawk the Music Princess!

V0712_19_00_14_0.text: Go get 'em, Clubinet the Music Princess!

V0712_19_00_15_0.text:
Trombow the Music Princess of Melodic Crown!
Attack!

V0712_19_00_16_0.text: Attack, Horn Knives the Music Princess!

V0712_19_00_17_0.text:
Go, Boton the Music Princess!
Attack!

V0712_26_00_01_0.text:
Is that it?
What do you have next?
